description: Unit-test eval fixture for METRO Moldova catalog retrieval. 34 cases covering fuzzy intent, Romanian names, abbreviations, UOM-qualified, category-concept, near-duplicate disambiguation, typo variants, and null-category weak spots. Uses synthetic prod_* IDs seeded by test_rag_backend.py. Barcodes intentionally excluded — users search by name/intent.

queries.query: need greek yogurt for metro order
queries.notes: Fuzzy English intent — existing baseline case
Fuzzy English intent — existing baseline case
Romanian exact uppercase — lexical should dominate
Romanian exact uppercase partial match
Romanian exact uppercase — chocolate disambiguation
Romanian exact — must NOT return 2L variant
Romanian exact — must NOT return 1L variant
Romanian exact multi-word product name
Romanian fuzzy: peanut halva. Semantic should connect halva variants.
Romanian fuzzy: raspberry tea. Semantic path needed — no exact token match.
Romanian fuzzy: 1L milk phrased with unit word
Romanian fuzzy: 70% chocolate. Semantic similarity to CIOCOLATA ALBA 70%.
Romanian fuzzy: gingerbread with fruit. Semantic needed.
Abbreviation: sunflower seeds abbreviated as SEM FL
Abbreviation: chocolate butter abbreviated
Abbreviation: sour cream (smantana) truncated
UOM-qualified English: bottle specifier
UOM-qualified Romanian: volume qualifier disambiguates from 2L
UOM-qualified Romanian: chamomile tea in sachets (plicuri)
Category concept: baby chamomile tea. Semantic + category Beverages.
Category concept: fruit/herbal tea — broad query hitting Beverages.
Category concept: nut-based sweets. Semantic path via Snacks + arahide.
Category concept: dairy product for order. Broad Dairy category.

queries.query: lapte 1L versus lapte 2L — vreau cel de 2 litri
queries.notes: Near-duplicate disambiguation: explicit 2L preference in query
Near-duplicate disambiguation: smallest milk = 1L

queries.query: ceai verde vs ceai de zmeura — vreau cel cu zmeura
queries.notes: Near-duplicate disambiguation: explicit raspberry preference
Near-duplicate disambiguation: white chocolate explicitly selected
Typo: greek misspelled. Semantic should be robust.
Typo: mineral misspelled
Typo: orange juice heavily misspelled
Null-category weak spot: baby carrots — no category in embedding text
Null-category weak spot: cherry tomatoes — no category, fuzzy Romanian
Null-category weak spot: small salad vegetables — category-concept with null category
Null-category weak spot: query for uncategorized product
